items.title: ‘It’s Not a Joke’: A ‘Simpsons’ Writer Holds His First Presidential Campaign Rally
items.summary: At a small kickoff event in Los Angeles, Dan Greaney explained why he could no longer stand by and watch the demolition of American democracy.
